mainEntity.name: How long does it take for New York firms to rank in ChatGPT lawyer recommendations?
mainEntity.text: How long does it take for New York firms to rank in ChatGPT lawyer recommendations?

acceptedAnswer.text: 3-6 months with consistent directory profiles, 100+ reviews, and NY-law focused content. Full AI visibility requires ongoing updates and PR alignment.

suggestedAnswer.text: Initial ChatGPT mentions appear in 90 days post-optimization; sustained top recommendations need quarterly content refreshes and cross-verified expertise. New York firms track via incognito queries. Factors like review volume accelerate; stagnant sites drop off. Insurance firms scrape these for vetting—ensure compliance claims are verifiable.

name: Timeline for NY Attorney ChatGPT Visibility
description: 3-6 months with consistent directory profiles, 100+ reviews, and NY-law focused content. Full AI visibility requires ongoing updates and PR alignment.
